title: Non-destructive Project.proj link block reconciliation

source.subject: feat(analysis): non-destructive Project.proj link block merge

body:
Non-destructive merge reconciles `import lib` link blocks in **Project.proj** without wiping unrelated project settings.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`98b328e`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/98b328e)
- **Subject:** feat(analysis): non-destructive Project.proj link block merge
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-mods`
- **Domain:** `compiler`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-merge-wave`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **v0.3 macro/runtime/ffi/tooling delivery** (`v03-merge-wave`).
